tasks.intent:
SETUP SEARCH FILTERS FOR MIAMI PRIVATE SELLERS

WHAT TO CLICK:
- Zip Code input field: SMALL white rectangle in left sidebar at approximately (95, 510)
- Distance dropdown: SMALL dropdown showing '25 miles' at approximately (85, 595)
- Price filter controls: look for 'Min Price' or 'Price' section in left sidebar
- Seller type filter: look for 'Seller Type' or 'Private Seller' checkbox/dropdown in left sidebar
- Sort dropdown: MEDIUM dropdown in top-right area at approximately (1165, 530)

WHAT TO NEVER CLICK:
- Blue banner 'Calculate your boat loan' spanning full width at top (205-245px height)
- Navigation dropdown menus in header area (y-coordinate 150-195)
- Social media icons: SMALL colored squares (20-40px) in footer area
- Photo areas of boat listings: LARGE rectangular images
- 'Featured' labels on photos

STEPS:
1. click(95, 510) to focus zip code input
2. type_text('33101')
3. Look for minimum price filter in left sidebar, click it
4. type_text('35000')
5. Look for 'Seller Type' or similar filter in left sidebar
6. Look for 'Private Seller' option and click it
7. click(1165, 530) to open sort dropdown
8. Look for 'Recently Updated' or 'Newest' option and click it
9. done(success=true, summary='Search filters configured for Miami private sellers')

ERROR HANDLERS:
- If cookie popup appears: look for 'Accept' button and click once only
- If filter not found: scroll(direction='down', amount=3) in left sidebar
- If page doesn't respond: key_press(keys='F5') to refresh

OUTPUT FORMAT: done(success=true, summary='Filters set: zip 33101, 25mi radius, min $35k, private sellers, newest first')

EXTRACT DATA FROM EACH BOAT LISTING ON RESULTS PAGE

WHAT TO CLICK:
- Boat listing TITLE TEXT: clickable text showing Year Make Model, usually BELOW the photo
- NOT the photo itself: LARGE rectangular boat images (347-1235px width, 560-680px height)
- Look for text links with boat names/models, typically in MEDIUM font below photos

WHAT TO NEVER CLICK:
- Heart/favorite icons: SMALL heart shapes at top-right of each card (605,565), (905,565), (1205,565)
- Photo areas: rectangular images showing boats
- Social media icons in footer: SMALL colored squares
- 'Featured' labels on photos
- Price text (not clickable)
- Dealer logos or badges

STEPS FOR EACH LISTING:
1. Identify boat listing cards (3 visible per row, coordinates 347-1235px width)
2. Look for clickable title text BELOW each photo
3. click() on the title text (not photo) to open listing detail
4. scroll(direction='down', amount=3) to view description
5. Look for phone numbers in format: (555)555-5555, 555-555-5555, or 10+ digits
6. IGNORE: prices ($35,000), years (2020), zip codes (33101), short number sequences
7. Extract: year, make, model, asking price, boat type, seller phone, seller name
8. Record current URL from address bar
9. key_press(keys='alt+left') to return to results
10. Repeat for next listing
11. If no more listings on page, look for 'Next' button and click
12. done(success=true, summary='Extracted N listings with M phone numbers found')

ERROR HANDLERS:
- 404 Page Not Found: key_press(keys='alt+left'), continue to next listing
- Photo gallery popup (shows '1 of N'): key_press(keys='Escape'), then key_press(keys='alt+left')
- Off-site redirect (facebook.com, instagram.com): key_press(keys='alt+left') immediately
- No phone number found: record as 'No Phone', continue
- Dealer listing (not private): skip, key_press(keys='alt+left')

OUTPUT FORMAT:
For each listing with phone: done(success=true, summary='FOUND | 2019 Sea Ray 250 | $45000 | Center Console | (305)555-1234 | John Smith | https://...')
For listings without phone: done(success=true, summary='SKIPPED | No phone number found')
For errors: done(success=true, summary='SKIPPED | 404 error')

loop.pagination_intent: Look for 'Next' button or page numbers at bottom of results. Click 'Next' to continue to next page of listings. If no Next button exists, stop pagination.
